skills.description: Forecasting and decision support for trades, founder/hiring/equity grants, deadlines, and other irreversible choices where weak-model language or offering to research instead of building the predictive model would be harmful.
activation_signals: trade decision
investment forecast
predictive world model
missing research
high consequence recommendation
cofounder or early-hire equity split
offer letter or grant terms for a key person
deciding a percent or amount for an irreversible personnel deal
user has authorized private data the decision depends on

skills.description: How an LLM agent should emit a structured decision or host-consumed payload to its host — tool call or strict response schema, not prompt-only JSON or a typed marker that leaks into the transcript.

quiet run or silent run feature
marker or tag leaking into transcript
Return only JSON for host-consumed data
JSON envelope parsed from assistant text
structured response schema for UI payload
regex parsing the model output
registering or naming an agent tool

tags input chips tabs combobox or select styling

skills.description: Register a folder as an Obsidian vault in ~/Library/Application Support/obsidian/obsidian.json before sending the user an obsidian:// URI, and verify Obsidian actually opened it before claiming the handoff worked.

Unable to find a vault for the URL
wrote markdown intended for Obsidian into a new folder
pre-created a .obsidian directory in a project folder
handing off a generated vault on macOS
obsidian://open?vault= or obsidian://open?path= failed

skills.description: Retrieve a needed token or secret from the machine's own stores (env files, macOS Keychain, 1Password, provider CLIs) before asking the user to paste it, and authenticate a provider API with its token via the official MCP or CLI rather than scraping browser cookies.
activation_signals: blocked on a missing API token or secret
about to ask the user for a credential
CLI errors with missing or invalid token
an env var like SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN is unset
need an auth token to deploy or call a service
calling a provider API like Sentry or Supabase programmatically
about to read or decrypt browser cookies to authenticate an API
user points at a chat thread or clipboard history for a credential
about to declare a credential missing that a teammate may have shared
